headline: Need a teamplayer?
notions: Here what my colleagues said about me
headlineWide: Need a teamplayer? Here what my colleagues said about me

references.name: Davor Jezernik
references.feedback: Working with Nicole was a great experience. She is an excellent team player and always fostered a very pleasant and constructive working relationship. Her dedication was particularly impressive: she invested a great deal of time and energy to successfully advance our joint projects. Nicole works reliably, in a structured manner, and with a high degree of responsibility. I can wholeheartedly recommend her as a colleague.

references.name: Fourat Oueslati
references.feedback: Nicole is a true fighter. She never loses focus and always gives her best. She sees problems not as obstacles, but as challenges. She has often surprised us with new ideas and constantly thinks outside the box. She knows exactly how to work in a team and always brings positive energy.
